name: Five-Alarm Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 fresh hot green chili peppers, seeded and minced
or 1/2 cup chopped canned green chili peppers
1/2 cup finely chopped white or yellow onion
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring all the ingredients to a simmer over medium heat.
2. Cook for 5 minutes.
3. Spoon the salsa into hot, sterilized jars and attach the lids.
4. Process the jars in a boiling water bath for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from the water and cool at room temperature.
Note: The canned chili peppers will make a milder salsa than if you use fresh chile peppers. After opening, you can extend the salsa (and mute the heat a little) by stirring in a cupful of minced bell peppers or thawed corn kernels. A tablespoon or so of chopped coriander leaves adds a nice flavor. Makes about 2 pints.
